title: paspalum quadrifarium
intro: Paspalum quadrifarium, also known as four-angled paspalum, is a type of tropical grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Paspalum quadrifarium include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Paspalum quadrifarium can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
